title: A Pandemic: Away from the Motherland
original_title: A Pandemic: Away from the Motherland
overview: As the Pandemic breaks, 5 doctors in the USA treat COVID-19 patients away from their Motherland. An emotional journey of healthcare workers and their families with unfiltered content from their personal lives shot entirely during the lockdown.
